name: Table

unions.name: Column
cases: { name : String.String, abbrev : String.String, width : String.String, sortable : Basics.Bool, hiddable : Basics.Bool, searchable : Maybe.Maybe (a -> String.String), visible : Basics.Bool, viewCell : a -> Table.Pipe msg -> List.List (Html.Html msg), viewHeader : Table.Pipe msg -> List.List (Html.Html msg), comp : Maybe.Maybe (a -> a -> Basics.Order) }

aliases.name: Config
aliases.type: { pipe : Table.State -> msg, columns : List.List (Table.Column a msg), pagination : Basics.Bool, numsPage : List.List Basics.Int, initialNumPage : Basics.Int, searchBar : Basics.Bool, selectNumByPage : Basics.Bool, hideColumn : Basics.Bool, onChange : Table.State -> msg, errorView : String.String -> Http.Error -> Html.Html msg, toolbar : List.List (Html.Html msg) }

aliases.name: Pagination
aliases.type: { search : String.String, orderBy : String.String, order : Table.Sort, page : Basics.Int, byPage : Basics.Int }

aliases.name: State
aliases.type: { visibleColumns : List.List String.String, orderBy : Maybe.Maybe String.String, order : Table.Sort, page : Basics.Int, byPage : Basics.Int, search : String.String, btPagination : Basics.Bool, btColumns : Basics.Bool, tmp : String.String }

values.name: col
values.type: (a -> a -> Basics.Order) -> (a -> Html.Html msg) -> String.String -> String.String -> Basics.Bool -> Basics.Bool -> Maybe.Maybe (a -> String.String) -> Table.Column a msg

values.name: colI
values.type: (a -> Basics.Int) -> String.String -> String.String -> Basics.Bool -> Basics.Bool -> Table.Column a msg

values.name: colS
values.type: (a -> String.String) -> String.String -> String.String -> Basics.Bool -> Basics.Bool -> Table.Column a msg

values.name: view
values.type: Table.Config a msg -> Table.State -> Table.Rows a -> Html.Html msg

values.name: viewHeader
values.type: String.String -> String.String -> Basics.Bool -> Table.Pipe msg -> List.List (Html.Html msg)

values.name: withViewCell
values.type: (a -> Table.Pipe msg -> List.List (Html.Html msg)) -> Table.Column a msg -> Table.Column a msg

values.type: String.String -> Table.Column a msg -> Table.Column a msg
